name: Fredbear's Family Diner
causeOfClosure: Closed after the Bite of '83 and the tragedies surrounding the Afton and Emily families

incidents.name: The Bite of '83
incidents.description: Fredbear crushes the Crying Child's head during his birthday party after bullies shove him into the animatronic's mouth.

incidents.name: Charlotte Emily's murder
incidents.description: William Afton's first victim, killed outside the restaurant; the exact venue (Fredbear's vs an early Freddy's) is debated.
incidents.source: Freddy Fazbear's Pizzeria Simulator (Security Puppet minigame)

notes: The franchise's in-universe origin point, seen through FNAF 4's minigames.
Also referenced across Sister Location and Pizzeria Simulator lore; appearances list on-screen depictions only.

name: Freddy Fazbear's Pizza (FNAF 1)
causeOfClosure: Scheduled to close by year's end amid sanitation complaints, foul odors and the company's ruined reputation

incidents.name: The Missing Children Incident
incidents.description: Five children lured away and murdered by William Afton in a Spring Bonnie suit; their bodies were never found and their souls possessed the animatronics.
incidents.source: FNAF 1 newspaper clippings and FNAF 3 minigames; the exact year is community-reconstructed

notes: Virtually recreated inside Help Wanted's The Freddy Fazbear Virtual Experience.
Whether the Missing Children Incident happened here or at an earlier Freddy's is a long-running timeline debate.

name: Freddy Fazbear's Pizza (FNAF 2)
causeOfClosure: Closed after the events of 1987; the Toy animatronics were scrapped

incidents.name: The Bite of '87
incidents.description: An animatronic bites a person's frontal lobe during the day shift; the victim survives. The perpetrator is never confirmed.

incidents.name: The 'SAVE THEM' murders
incidents.description: The FNAF 2 minigames depict William Afton attacking children at a party, followed by the Puppet's intervention.

notes: Chronologically a prequel: opened and closed in 1987, before the FNAF 1 location's events.

name: Fazbear's Fright: The Horror Attraction
causeOfClosure: Burned down before opening to the public

incidents.name: The Fazbear's Fright fire
incidents.description: The attraction burns down after a week of nights; Springtrap survives the blaze.
incidents.source: FNAF 3 ending newspaper and FNAF 3's continuity in later games

notes: Horror attraction built thirty years after FNAF 1 from salvaged Fazbear relics; its centerpiece find was the real Springtrap.

name: The Crying Child's House
notes: FNAF 4's bedroom setting, widely theorized to be the Afton residence; the nightmares are commonly read as the Crying Child's dreams.
Rooms (Bedroom, Closet, both Halls) omitted from the rooms field since the layout is dream logic rather than architecture.

name: Circus Baby's Entertainment and Rental
causeOfClosure: Abandoned after Ennard's escape through Michael Afton's body

incidents.name: Elizabeth Afton's death
incidents.description: Circus Baby's claw captures and kills Elizabeth; the incident happened at the short-lived Circus Baby's Pizza World venue, whose animatronics were moved to this underground rental facility.
incidents.source: Sister Location (Baby's ice cream story and cutscenes)

incidents.name: The Scooping Room escape
incidents.description: The Funtimes, merged as Ennard, scoop Michael Afton and use his body to reach the surface.

notes: Underground facility beneath a nondescript surface building, reached by elevator.

name: Freddy Fazbear's Pizza Place
causeOfClosure: Deliberately burned down by Henry Emily to destroy the possessed animatronics

incidents.name: The Pizzeria Simulator fire
incidents.description: Henry's trap: the entire pizzeria was designed as a maze with no exits, luring Scrap Baby, Scraptrap, Molten Freddy and Lefty before being set ablaze, freeing the trapped souls.

notes: The playable manager is strongly implied to be Michael Afton; kept out of presentCharacters pending confirmation.
The Mega Pizzaplex was later built above this site's remains.

name: Freddy Fazbear's Mega Pizzaplex
causeOfClosure: Condemned and left in ruins after the Security Breach events

incidents.name: Built above the Pizza Place
incidents.description: The Pizzaplex stands over the burned remains of Freddy Fazbear's Pizza Place, reachable through the sublevels.

incidents.name: The Mimic's containment
incidents.description: Cassie's rescue attempt ends with the Mimic sealed beneath the ruined Pizzaplex, guarded by the M.X.E.S. security AI.

notes: The largest in-universe Fazbear venue: a three-story entertainment megaplex.

name: Murray's Costume Co.
notes: Edwin Murray's 1979 costume factory, where the Mimic was created; setting of Secret of the Mimic.
Verify the venue's official name, status and full cast on the wiki before publishing.

name: Freddy Fazbear's Pizza (Novel Trilogy)
causeOfClosure: Closed after the children's disappearances; a shopping mall was later built enclosing the intact restaurant

incidents.name: The missing children
incidents.description: William Afton, as Dave Miller, abducts and murders children at the restaurant; their spirits linger inside the animatronics.

notes: Located in Hurricane, Utah; the mall built around the sealed restaurant is The Silver Eyes' central setting.
Fredbear's Family Diner also exists in this continuity as the site of the twin abduction; add it as its own entry during a novels sweep if needed.

name: Circus Baby's Pizza (Novel Trilogy)

incidents.name: The Fourth Closet abductions
incidents.description: Children are lured and abducted through the new pizzeria as part of William's remnant experiments.

notes: Verify its final fate (destroyed vs abandoned) on the wiki before publishing.

name: Jeff's Pizza
notes: Ordinary pizzeria occupying a former Freddy's building; its ball pit acts as a portal to the location's 1985 past.
Status reflects the story's timeframe.

name: Freddy Fazbear's Pizza (Movie)
causeOfClosure: Abandoned since the 1980s after the children's disappearances

incidents.name: The five missing children
incidents.description: William Afton murders five children at the restaurant; their spirits possess the animatronics and remain bound to the building.

notes: The physical set was built practically for the film; verify how Five Nights at Freddy's 2 (2025) changes the location's status before publishing.
